hero.tagline: A full-featured download manager — rebuilt from the ground up.
story.title: Why Motrix Next?
story.p1: Motrix by agalwood was one of the best open-source download managers available — clean UI, aria2-powered, cross-platform. It inspired thousands of users and developers alike.
story.p2: The original project has been largely inactive since 2023. The Electron + Vue 2 + Vuex + Element UI stack accumulated technical debt, making it increasingly difficult to maintain, extend, or package for modern platforms.
rewrite.title: A ground-up rewrite.
rewrite.lead: Same download manager spirit, entirely new codebase.
motion.title: Design & Motion
motion.p1: The UI layout stays true to Motrix's original design — the sidebar navigation, task list, and preference panels follow the familiar structure.
motion.p2: Everything underneath changed. Every transition and micro-interaction follows Material Design 3 motion guidelines.
motion.timing.title: Asymmetric timing
motion.timing.desc: Enter animations are slightly longer than exits. New content takes time to land; dismissed content leaves quickly.
motion.easing.title: Emphasized easing
motion.easing.desc: Decelerate on enter, accelerate on exit. No generic ease curves.
motion.spring.title: Spring-based modals
motion.spring.desc: Dialogs use physically-modeled spring animations for a natural, responsive feel.
motion.tokens.title: Motion tokens
motion.tokens.desc: All durations and curves are CSS custom properties, ensuring a unified rhythm across 12+ components.
features.title: Features
features.protocol.title: Multi-protocol
features.bt.title: BitTorrent
features.bt.desc: Selective file download, DHT, peer exchange, encryption.
features.tracker.title: Tracker management
features.concurrent.title: Concurrent downloads
features.concurrent.desc: Up to 10 tasks with configurable thread count.
features.speed.title: Speed control
features.tray.title: System tray
features.tray.desc: Real-time speed display in the menu bar (macOS).
features.dark.title: Dark mode
features.dark.desc: Native dark theme with system preference detection.
features.i18n.title: Internationalization
features.i18n.desc: Auto-detects system language on first launch.
features.task.title: Task management
features.task.desc: Pause, resume, delete with file cleanup, batch operations.
features.handler.title: Protocol handler
features.handler.desc: Register as default handler for magnet and thunder links.
features.notify.title: Notifications
features.light.title: Lightweight
dl.title: Download
footer.ack: Grateful to {link} for laying the groundwork
